status=success
$ python -m py_compile app/app.py app/importers.py
$ bash -n install.sh
$ curl -fL --retry 3 -o /tmp/sing-box.tar.gz https://github.com/Ricky-Hao/sing-box/releases/download/v1.13.13-rickyhao.22/sing-box-1.13.13-rickyhao.22-linux-amd64.tar.gz
